seo.title: Contact SSVID – Get Support & Copyright Assistance
seo.meta_description: Contact SSVID for support, questions, or copyright-related requests. Reach us anytime via email for fast assistance.

hero.subtitle: Get in touch with our support team

sections.content: If you have questions, feedback, or need assistance related to SSVID, feel free to contact us via email. We aim to respond as quickly as possible.

For general questions or technical issues, please contact us at:
Email: contact.ssvidcc@gmail.com

If you are a copyright owner or authorized representative and believe that content accessed through SSVID infringes your rights, please contact us directly via email with detailed information. We take copyright concerns seriously and will review all valid requests.
SSVID is a free online tool that helps users download YouTube videos for offline use. To learn more about how SSVID works, visit the About SSVID page or return to the homepage.
